final_prompt.prompt:
Create a PPT cover slide for a product launch announcement (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs an "通透震撼" (transparent and impactful) aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include a large background image as the visual anchor, with title and subtitle overlaid
Subject: must include the product launch context for 长安起源Q06
Scene/backdrop: must include a transparent and impactful background image that fits the brand tone
Lighting/mood: needs an impactful atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a brand-aligned direction — exact color values are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "长安起源Q06将于9月上市" (split into main title and subtitle as appropriate)
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must preserve the product name 长安起源Q06 and the September launch timing
Avoid:
